target.label: Bootstrap Python test runner (pytest under uv) + root pyproject.toml

rationale: Epic-1 reopen-arc bootstrap Python-test-runner story (issue #233 course-correction); 2nd Epic-1-reopen-arc trace-WAIVED (after Story 1.17 iter-360) + 3rd course-correction-origin trace-WAIVED (after Story 2.18 iter-351 + Story 1.17 iter-360). 30th cumulative trace-WAIVED across substrate stories (1.7→1.16, 2.1→2.18, 1.17, now 1.18). Hybrid grounds (a) substrate-verification covers AC + (c) variant-(ii)+(iii): every AC ↔ substrate file 1:1 — AC1 ↔ four pytest smokes (`tests/test_ralph.py` 2 tests + `scripts/tests/test_bootstrap_bmad_agents.py` 1 test + `packages/devbox/tui/tests/test_theme.py` 1 test) FULL; iter-env pytest 9.0.3 reporter `4 passed in 0.97s` captured at dev-story v1.3 iter-366; AC2 ↔ pyproject.toml + uv.lock deterministic resolution + INV-deps-version-pinning sync-gate green for new drift (PARTIAL — INV-pytest-pin/INV-uv-lock-determinism manifest registration deferred to Story 1.20/1.21 per SC-8 + SC-9; pre-existing 3× INV-git-hooks-preservation drifts on feat/epic-2-packaged-devbox head carved out per SC-9, contentHash mismatch identical to Story 1.17 iter-359 baseline); AC3 ↔ .github/workflows/ci.yml python-job appended additively (node-job byte-identical per SC-5) with astral-sh/setup-uv@v6 + version: '0.11.7' + uv sync --extra dev --frozen + uv run pytest (PARTIAL — actionlint unavailable in iter env per AC3 fallback clause; GH ingestion-side validation post-PR-base-flip-to-main per SC-6); AC4 ↔ CLAUDE.md `| Run Python tests | `uv run pytest` |` row appended after `Run lint` row (PARTIAL — substrate prettier-idempotent per pnpm format:check GREEN; no automated prose-quality assertion); AC5 ↔ AGENTS.md byte-pinned second-sentence rewrite to active-tense `uv run pytest` wording (PARTIAL — first + third sentences byte-identical per SC-5 substrate clause + AC5 third clause; cross-ref to architecture.md § M0 preserved). Deterministic FAIL signal (P0 50%, P1 0%, overall 20%) is structural artefact — Story 1.18 IS the Python test runner being authored, no pre-existing pytest corpus to enforce coverage against. FR14n § ATDD-skip ground-(b) sunset post-Story-1.17 per issue #233 amendment (cross-runtime extension preserves the substrate-extension class). Substrate-probe gap discovered + corrected at dev-story time (RALPH.md iter-366 lessons-learned): SM-validate Subtask 3.1 missed `ralph.py:66` top-level `from textual.app import` (5 textual imports at :66/67/68/71/72 all top-level despite `if __name__ == "__main__":` guard at :2015-2016); resolution: added textual==8.2.4 as 5th dev dep (SC-3 four-dev-deps wording was forecast not policy; SC-3 policy [exact-version pinning per I7] preserved on all 5). Resolved-highest version drift vs spec forecast: pytest 9.0.3 (vs 8.x), pytest-asyncio 1.3.0 (vs 0.x), ruff 0.15.12 + mypy 1.20.2 + textual 8.2.4 within or near forecast — explicit consequences of `--resolution=highest` per Subtask 1.2's literal command. Residual risks tracked: (1) Python-dep manifest registration deferred to Story 1.20 (path-a SC-9) or 1.21 (path-b SC-9); (2) actionlint behavioural half deferred to GH ingestion when PR base-flips to main; (3) 3× pre-existing INV-git-hooks-preservation drifts (RALPH.md iter-358 gotcha — sync-gate worktree-mode resolver bug; address before Story 1.20 close-out); (4) substrate-probe-gap carry-rule codified for future Python-substrate stories. Cumulative Story 1.18 lifecycle pre-merge PATCH count to date: 14 (unchanged — trace adds zero PATCH per WAIVED with 0 fix-task QUEUE entries; matches Story 1.17 iter-360 zero-PATCH trace baseline). Story 1.18 advances FR14n in-dev → traced; next QUEUE = /bmad-create-story (args: 'review') post-dev SM (forecast 1–4 PATCH per RALPH.md iter-352 narrow-substrate-extension empirical envelope; iter-361 confirmed Story 1.17 post-dev SM yielded 4 PATCH at gate within band). PR #236 stacks on feat/epic-2-packaged-devbox (parent PR #230 + #234 + #235 stacked-arc); ci.yml workflow does not fire on this push (Draft PR base ≠ main; `on: { pull_request: { branches: [main] } }` trigger gated until base-flip).
